conventions.advisory: Conventions are advisory only — nothing in the store validates or special-cases the documented namespaces.
agent_first_contact_sequence: task list --project <CODE> --label <CODE>:context:start-here — get the entry-point pointer and follow it
task list --project <CODE> --label <CODE>:repo:* / :doc:* / :context:* — discover index tasks for repos, docs, and always-read context
first_time_human_sequence: create the project (Add in the Projects tab)
create seed index tasks (start-here, repo:<name>, doc:<name>, context:always-read) and initial work tasks, labeling as you go

namespaces.examples: open, todo, in-progress, done, blocked, review
namespaces.purpose: workflow states — labels only, no state machine
index task whose description says where to find the repo — repo to project binding in the label substrate
index task pointing at a doc/resource and how to use it
pointer to the always-read context markdown (replaces the deleted v1 Project Guide)
the single entry-point task a fresh agent queries first; its description is the read this first pointer
who's working on what — replaces v1 Claim; last-writer-wins, no conflict detection
task relationships via labels (replaces v1 Links)
